MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO EVANGELINA AND DAVID SOTO. PROPOSED AMENDMENTS ARE INSUFFICIENT TO INDICATE WHICH OF THE 20 CAUSES OF ACTION ARE GOING TO BE ALLEED BY EVANGELINA AND DAVID AND WHICH ARE NOT. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 128.7
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Hain, Esq.(831-227-6892) for Plaintiff/Moving party VICENTE SOTO.
Karen Uchiyama, Esq. (415-563-9301) for Defendant/opposing party Ritu Vohra.

The Court announces it's leaning to grant the 2 motions. Hearing is held. Both sides argue the withdrawal of the 998 offer and the procedural standard for 128.7. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:


PLAINTIFF VICENTE SOTO's Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 128.7 is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Defendans' Filing Of Notice Of Acceptance Of Section 998 Offer
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Hain, Esq.(831-227-6892) for Plaintiff/Moving party VICENTE SOTO.
Karen Uchiyama, Esq. (415-563-9301) for Defendant/opposing party Ritu Vohra.

The Court announces it's leaning to grant the 2 motions. Hearing is held.Both sides argue the withdrawal of the 998 offer and the procedural standard for 128.7. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF VICENTE SOTO's Motion To Set Aside Defendants' Filing Of Notice Of Acceptance Of Section 998 Offer is Granted. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Defendans' Filing Of Notice Of Acceptance Of Section 998 Offer
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF VICENTE SOTO's Motion To Set Aside Defendans' Filing Of Notice Of Acceptance Of Section 998 Offer is continued to September 28, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than September 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on Monday, July 20, 2015:
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq. (415.563.9300) for Defendant Ritu Vohra.

No appearance by counsel for plaintiff/moving party. Defense counsel states there is no opposition. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF VICENTE SOTO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Complaint may be amended to add Rosa Soto. Motion is denied without prejudice as to Evangelina and David Soto. Proposed amendments are insufficient to indicate which of the 20 causes of action are going to be alleed by Evangelina and David and which are not. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (501/SRB)
